creator: lukasz@wasikowski.net
text:
There is format error in /usr/ports/MOVED file which causes portsdb utility to fail with 'portsdb: MOVED file format error'.

Fix: 

Change line:
sysutils/cd-write|2007-07-06|Obsolete port

to:
sysutils/cd-write||2007-07-06|Obsolete port
How-To-Repeat: cvsup ports tree, then portsdb -Uu
